DP.067.0000:
All Pokémon have a special power
called an ability.
DP.067.0001:
How my Pokémon and I are alike...\f
It’s not anything I can explain
easily.
DP.067.0002:
The view is good from up here, but
it’s a pain going out.\f
If you don’t mind, how about showing
me a Pokémon called ZUBAT?
DP.067.0003:
The view is good from up here, but
it’s a pain going out.\f
If you don’t mind, how about showing
me a Pokémon called ZUBAT?\f
Oh! That Pokémon!
That’s a ZUBAT!\f
Wow, that’s cool...
It’s so cute...\f
That does it!
I’ll go out and catch Pokémon, too!\f
Thank you, my friend!
This is a token of my thanks!\f
DP.067.0004:
Yeah, there are so many kinds of
Pokémon out in the world.\f
I want to see them all now!
